text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, the ominous presence I sensed from this
direction seems to have... vanished.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wait. It's faint, but I feel something. What is this
peculiar presence that stirs a strange sense of
peace in me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Is this the doing of the Three Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What am I saying? Enough nonsense, Yaeno
Muteki!
